Purpose: Used to identify the student checking in and display their name on the live lecturer attendance roster.
Responsible_Action: Restrict visibility to authorized staff and the student themselves.

Purpose: Unique institutional identifier used to log and bind the attendance record to the correct academic profiles.
Responsible_Action: Encrypt the database field at rest to prevent student profile scraping.

Purpose: Captures coordinates to verify the student is physically inside the classroom boundaries during scanning.
Responsible_Action: Use instantly for proximity validation in the code; do not log permanent location history.

Purpose: Identifies the host creator of the tracking session and logs who authorized the attendance window.
Responsible_Action: No high-level privacy restriction needed as instructor names are public schedule data.

Purpose: Unique institutional identifier used to verify the user has authorization rules to open a new tracking session.
Responsible_Action: Restrict access control so students cannot view or intercept staff ID tokens.

Purpose: Identifies which specific class session the QR check-in token belongs to.
Responsible_Action: No privacy restrictions needed as course schedules are public institutional data.

Purpose: Specifies the target classroom location where the active check-in radius is centered.
Responsible_Action: No specific privacy restrictions required for room numbers.
